next_steps: Perform flexible bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) for Gomori methenamine silver stain, AFB smear and culture, GeneXpert for M. tuberculosis, and multiplex PCR for common respiratory pathogens
Obtain serum and urine Histoplasma antigen
Obtain blood cultures for mycobacteria and fungi
Conduct chest CT with IV contrast to characterize pulmonary nodules and screen for mediastinal lymphadenopathy
Obtain brain MRI with and without gadolinium to investigate encephalopathy and potential CNS involvement
Perform serum HIV-1/2 viral load and repeat CD4 count to ensure accurate staging
Initiate urgent empirical therapy for P. jirovecii and broad-spectrum antimicrobial coverage while awaiting diagnostic results
